__note_brackets: The [ ] pair does double duty in Candor: bracketed lists/index (a[i], [1,2,3]) AND the type brackets for slices/arrays [T]/[N]T and the generic argument/param list Foo[T] / fn f[T]. There is no <...> generic bracketing (OBL-GENERIC-BRACKET), so [ ] is the sole type/generic bracket and is listed once.
__note_wordPattern: `::` is reserved exclusively for the enum-variant path (E::V). Including an optional leading `::` in the word pattern keeps double-click/rename selection sane around variant paths without treating `::` as an identifier character.
